accept_public_limitations: Acceptance allows limited provenance-bound public claims only.
Acceptance does not prove rights clearance.
Acceptance does not prove malware safety.
Acceptance does not make a claim canonical truth.
Accepted records require audit trail preservation.
rejection_or_supersession: Rejected entries remain audit records and do not mutate the master index.
Superseded entries must point to successor decision or queue entry records.
Quarantined entries require explicit future review before publication.
notes: This file defines future acceptance gates only.
No hosted master index or queue runtime exists in this milestone.
